title: Tomaquet Cassaba Fritters
description: Delicious Mexican fritters made with sautéed tomatoes and cassaba. Perfect as a snack or dessert.
instructions: Grate the cassaba and set aside.
Dice the tomaquet and sauté in a pan with a little oil until tender.
In a large bowl, combine the grated cassaba, sautéed tomaquet, light, spanish, amb, and pa.
Mix well and shape into patties.
Heat a non-stick pan with a little oil and cook the patties until golden brown.
Flip and cook the other side until golden brown.
Serve warm with your favorite dipping sauce.
